title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.050 - Bond, approval
text:
60.050.  Bond, approval. — Such bond may be taken by the clerk of the county commission in vacation; and, if so taken, shall be approved or rejected by the county commission at the next term thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 13194) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11575; 1919 § 12713; 1909 § 11295
